• Type of AI Technology: Micron uses the Eightfold AI recruiting software, a machine-learning talent-intelligence platform that uses natural-language processing to parse resumes, infer candidate skills and calculate compatibility scores with open positions.

• AndUsing data structures to build efficient, scalable, and well-performing software products that meet user needs and business objectives.
• Overseeing all stages of the product development lifecycle (PDLC), including ideation, design, development, testing, launch and maintenance.
• Using Unix or Linux environment to design, develop, test, deploy, and maintain software products.
• Using Perl for scripting, test automation, data manipulation/parsing and integration.
• Writing scripts in Python or Java for data analysis and testing.
• Using MongoDB across the entire product development lifecycle to design, develop, test, and improve data-driven applications.
• Using SQL to extract and analyze data from databases to understand user behavior and measure product performance.
• Utilizing Git for version control and collaboration throughout the product development lifecycle.
software engineering job for the role Data Engineer, PXT Central Science
